elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65
single sloped roof face visible in profile, small angle callout at the ridge (illegible exact degree value on this sheet, consistent with the 6° figure printed on the roof plan)
two window openings tagged hexagon '2', upper floor, flanking a central feature
opening tagged pentagon/box '5', upper floor, centered between the two hexagon-2 windows — likely the stairwell landing window (matches D/W schedule window '5', ▼ระดับชานพักบันได)
window opening tagged hexagon '1', lower floor, left side
two window openings tagged hexagon '2', lower floor, right side
X-hatched large opening at lower floor, far right — represents the open จอดรถ carport bay (no wall/window, just structural opening)
'เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC' reveal lines, one at upper floor level (right side), one at lower floor level (right side)

warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): bottom dimension chain reads '1.50 | 3.00 | 2.20 | 4.00 | 1.50 | 2.05' totaling 10.70 (row E to row A) then continuing to the road edge — exactly matches the master grid's y_lines (E=0.0,D=3.0,C=5.2,B=9.2,A=10.7).
This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '2' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-08).

This is the elevation showing the open จอดรถ carport bay (X-hatched void at lower-right) — matches the ground-floor plan's grid2-3 x gridC-gridB carport and the roof plan's notch cut-out over that same bay.

Individual door/window opening-number-to-D/W-schedule cross-match not confidently resolvable at this resolution — see _หน้า16_door_window_schedule.json for the schedule itself. Window '5' tentatively matches the stair-landing window recorded in that schedule (dimension 1.40m, height 2.90m breakdown, note '▼ระดับชานพักบันได').
